settings.support_note: Start with the role: Travel Hub for portability, Multimedia Hub for balanced everyday use, and Pro Dock for the permanent desk.

settings.heading: Choose the EZQuest product built for your setup
settings.copy: Start with the role: most portable, most balanced, or most desk-ready. From there, open the product page that matches it.
settings.source_note: Choose the role first. Open the matching product page next. Use compatibility or support only when you want a final confirmation.

settings.heading: Need a final confirmation?
settings.copy: Check compatibility first. If the setup is unusual, support can help from there.
